steps.title: Use the source relationship
steps.content: The text describes influences on Puerto Rican Spanish, including Indigenous and African languages. If certain vowel pronunciations are linked to Yoruba, they can be described as having origins in that language.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content: Choice B would mean the vowel sounds are declared to Yoruba. Choice C would mean they are presented to Yoruba. Choice D would mean they are given up to Yoruba. None expresses an origin relationship. The answer is A.
